note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 3.8 cm x 2.2 cm x 1.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 63% slough, 37% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
